# frameDropped

**Type Property**

A frame decode operation status that indicates the system dropped the output of the frame for a reason other than an error.

## Declaration

```swift
static var frameDropped: MEDecodeFrameStatus { get }
```

## Discussion

The decoder sets this value if [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEDecodeFrameOptions/doNotOutputFrame] is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].
title: frameDropped
